= src
:description: Project directory

This directory is part of the paint.type project.

== Purpose

Project directory.


As a Level 6 directory (`third_party/gossamer/src/interface/ffi/src/`), it supports the overall
project structure.

== Contents by Functional Grouping\n\n=== Source Files\n\n* `webview_gtk.zig` — webview_gtk configuration or data\n* `csp.zig` — csp configuration or data\n* `filesystem.zig` — filesystem configuration or data\n* `plugin.zig` — plugin configuration or data\n* `main.zig` — main configuration or data\n* `dialog.zig` — dialog configuration or data\n* `webview_cocoa.zig` — webview_cocoa configuration or data\n* `clipboard.zig` — clipboard configuration or data\n* `webview_ios.zig` — webview_ios configuration or data\n* `webview_android.zig` — webview_android configuration or data\n* `ssg.zig` — ssg configuration or data\n* `file_watcher.zig` — file_watcher configuration or data\n* `groove.zig` — groove configuration or data\n* `ipc.zig` — ipc configuration or data\n* `ipc_handlers.zig` — ipc_handlers configuration or data\n* `bridge_game_server.zig` — bridge_game_server configuration or data\n* `webview_win32.zig` — webview_win32 configuration or data\n* `tray.zig` — tray configuration or data\n* `conf.zig` — conf configuration or data\n* `shell.zig` — shell configuration or data\n\n=== Other Files\n\n* `0.4-AI-MANIFEST.a2ml` — A2ML machine-readable metadata\n\n
== Purpose of Each Component

Each file in this directory serves a specific purpose.

*Source files* implement core functionality.\n
*Other files* support directory operations.\n
